overall.description: First-person perspective walking along an overgrown dirt path at night in a rural setting, passing a wooden building on the left. The footage appears to be from a survival horror video game with cinematic low-light rendering and dense vegetation.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, overgrown rural path at night. Tall grass flanks both sides of a narrow dirt trail as the camera moves forward. A wooden house is visible as a dark silhouette on the left horizon, gradually approaching as the walk continues through the dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown rural path passing wooden house

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path alongside the wooden house, navigating the uneven dirt trail

entered.detail: small rocks and debris scattered across the dirt path surface

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward along the dark path, now passing closer to the wooden house on the left. The building moves from the far distance to the mid-ground as the path reveals scattered rocks underfoot. The tall grass continues to line both sides of the trail as the journey proceeds into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark, rural trail that gradually brings a distant silhouette into clear view. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by tall, dense grass under the cover of night. As the camera advances through the overgrown vegetation, a wooden house emerges on the left horizon and slowly shifts from a far-off shape into the mid-ground. The scene then evolves as the path reveals scattered rocks underfoot while the building looms closer. Finally, the camera continues its steady progression into the darkness, passing the structure as the surrounding wilderness closes in.
